creator: tomek@cedro.info
text:
# cat /etc/group | grep polkit
polkitd:*:565:

# kldload mac_seeotheruids
# security.mac.seeotheruids.primarygroup_enabled=565
# sysctl security.mac.seeotheruids.specificgid=565
# sysctl security.mac.seeotheruids.specificgid_enabled=1

# sysctl security.mac.seeotheruids
security.mac.seeotheruids.specificgid: 565
security.mac.seeotheruids.specificgid_enabled: 1
security.mac.seeotheruids.suser_privileged: 1
security.mac.seeotheruids.primarygroup_enabled: 565
security.mac.seeotheruids.enabled: 1

pcscd -f -d
(..)
03921880 ../src/winscard_msg_srv.c:253:ProcessEventsServer() Common channel packet arrival
00000027 ../src/winscard_msg_srv.c:265:ProcessEventsServer() ProcessCommonChannelRequest detects: 6
00000004 ../src/pcscdaemon.c:130:SVCServiceRunLoop() A new context thread creation is requested: 6
00003524 ../src/auth.c:148:IsClientAuthorized() Error in authorization: GDBus.Error:org.freedesktop.PolicyKit1.Error.Failed: get_kinfo_proc() failed for pid 71855: No such process
00000011 ../src/auth.c:168:IsClientAuthorized() Process 71855 (user: XXX) is NOT authorized for action: access_pcsc
00000103 ../src/winscard_svc.c:357:ContextThread() Rejected unauthorized PC/SC client
00000014 ../src/winscard_svc.c:1114:MSGCleanupClient() Thread is stopping: dwClientID=6, threadContext @0x12045ec23320
00000003 ../src/winscard_svc.c:1120:MSGCleanupClient() Freeing SCONTEXT @0x12045ec23320
00996769 ../src/ifdhandler.c:1209:IFDHPowerICC() action: PowerDown, usb:1050/0111:libusb-1.0:7:8:1 (lun: 0)
00000274 ../src/eventhandler.c:480:EHStatusHandlerThread() powerState: POWER_STATE_UNPOWERED

:-P
